examples.title: Algorithm: String Creation
examples.description: Create a string object using literals or new keyword
examples.code:
ALGORITHM CreateString
INPUT: literal (string)
OUTPUT: str (string)

BEGIN
 IF literal is not empty THEN
 str = new string object from literal
 ELSE
 str = empty string object
 END IF
 RETURN str
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates creating a string object using literals or the new keyword.
